panels.topic: Find other agent networking systems - decentralized alone is not a selling point
panels.decision: Compliance Positioning with Edge Secondary. Stop saying 'decentralized', start saying 'provable AI decisions'.

panels.topic: Competitive analysis of Servitor/Egregore vs similar tools (OpenClaw, etc.) - ease of implementation, scalability, networkability
panels.decision: Hybrid Strategy: MCP-First with Compliance Positioning

panels.topic: Thorough review of Thallus project for deployability, understandability, and lightweight hardware suitability
panels.decision: Project remains deployable and suitable for lightweight hardware. Minor documentation fixes recommended.

panels.topic: Design extraction of servitor daemon loop from main.rs (1,655 lines)
panels.decision: Extract into cli/ and runtime/ modules plus extend existing task/, egregore/, authority/ modules. 5-phase incremental approach.
